title: HelloHQ Sidecar Lifecycle Message
description: Tier 1 (Python sidecar) lifecycle messages, carried as newline-delimited JSON over stdin/stdout. Lifecycle messages carry a "type" field; RPC messages (envelope.schema.json) do not.

oneOf.title: ready
oneOf.description: Sidecar -> host. Sent once the runtime and plugin module are initialised. Must arrive within the startup timeout (default 10s).

oneOf.title: shutdown
oneOf.description: Host -> sidecar. Requests graceful shutdown (flush, exit 0) within the shutdown timeout (default 3s) before SIGKILL.

oneOf.title: pong
oneOf.description: Sidecar -> host, echoing the ping seq.

oneOf.title: event
oneOf.description: Sidecar -> host push. Forwarded to the plugin's WebView. Fire-and-forget (no id).
